_docs.permission_mode: default | bypass — bypass starts agents in auto-approve mode (no confirmation prompts). gemini uses --yolo, codex uses --full-auto.
_docs.default_agent: gemini | codex | ask — which CLI to use for worker tasks. 'ask' prompts you each time.
_docs.orchestrator: claude | gemini | codex — which CLI acts as orchestrator. Determines which pane reads ORCHESTRATOR.md.
